rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §38.0025, which governs school district dissemination of bacterial meningitis information. No conflict exists.
quote: The Department of State Health Services shall prescribe procedures by which each school district shall provide information relating to bacterial meningitis to its students and their parents each school year.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict analysis applicable.
